lantern 0.1.1
  • Articles
    • Workflows
    • Splitting genotypes by local ancestry
    • Multi-ancestry splitting (K >= 3 populations)
    • Ancestry-stratified gene-level burden tests
  • Reference

Reference

Unphased splitting

Functions for diploid genotype matrices where ancestry is summarised as a per-variant diploid code.

split_by_ancestry()

Split genotype matrix by ancestry

split_by_ancestry_multi()

Split unphased genotype matrix by ancestry for K populations

run_ancestry_pipeline()

lantern: High-Level Workflow Functions

count_ancestry_codes()

Count ancestry codes in matrix

Phased splitting

Functions for phased data where per-haplotype local ancestry is available (e.g. from RFMix). Splitting is deterministic.

split_phased()

Split phased haplotypes by ancestry

split_phased_multi()

Split phased haplotypes into K population-specific dosage matrices

run_phased_pipeline()

Run phased ancestry splitting pipeline

VCF utilities

Write and subset ancestry-specific VCF files.

write_vcf_with_ancestry()

Write VCF files with ancestry-specific dosages

create_ancestry_vcfs()

Create ancestry-specific VCF files

subset_vcf_by_range()

Subset VCF by genomic range

Downstream helpers

Helpers for preparing inputs to SMMAT gene-level tests.

calc_gene_ancestry_weights()

Calculate ancestry weights per gene

Package

lantern lantern-package

lantern: Ancestry-Specific Rare Variant Analysis

Contents

Developed by Yu Wang.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
